mapper.select: select count(1) from sys_role_menu where menu_id=#{menuId}
mapper.delete:
delete from sys_role_menu where role_id in
#{roleId}
mapper.insert:
insert into sys_role_menu(id, role_id, menu_id, hospital_id, supplier_id) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.hospitalId}, #{item.supplierId})

insert ignore into sys_role_menu(id, role_id, menu_id, hospital_id, supplier_id) values
(#{item.id}, #{item.roleId}, #{item.menuId}, #{item.hospitalId}, #{item.supplierId})
mapper.select: select distinct menu_id from sys_role_menu where role_id = #{roleId} and coalesce(nullif(trim(hospital_id), ''), '') = coalesce(nullif(trim(#{hospitalId}), ''), '') and coalesce(nullif(trim(supplier_id), ''), '') = coalesce(nullif(trim(#{supplierId}), ''), '')
mapper.delete: delete from sys_role_menu where trim(hospital_id) = trim(#{hospitalId}) and trim(hospital_id) <> ''
delete from sys_role_menu where trim(supplier_id) = trim(#{supplierId}) and trim(supplier_id) <> ''
mapper.select: select rm.role_id as roleId, rm.menu_id as menuId from sys_role_menu rm inner join sys_role r on r.role_id = rm.role_id and r.del_flag = '0' and r.role_type = 'hospital' and r.hospital_id is not null inner join scm_hospital h on h.hospital_id = r.hospital_id and h.del_flag = '0' and h.status = '0' where coalesce(nullif(trim(rm.supplier_id), ''), '') = '' and coalesce(nullif(trim(rm.hospital_id), ''), '') = cast(r.hospital_id as char)

select rm.role_id as roleId, rm.menu_id as menuId from sys_role_menu rm inner join sys_role r on r.role_id = rm.role_id and r.del_flag = '0' and r.role_type = 'supplier' and r.supplier_id is not null inner join scm_supplier s on s.supplier_id = r.supplier_id and s.del_flag = '0' and s.status = '0' where coalesce(nullif(trim(rm.hospital_id), ''), '') = '' and coalesce(nullif(trim(rm.supplier_id), ''), '') = cast(r.supplier_id as char)
